view.referral_explainer: Earn 50% of each referral's withdrawal fee. Limit: 10 referrals per account.

edit.title: Edit Profile
edit.photo_hint: JPG, PNG or WEBP · max 2 MB
edit.bio_placeholder: Tell us a bit about yourself...
edit.avatar_invalid_format: Invalid format. Use JPG, PNG or WEBP.
edit.avatar_upload_error: Error uploading photo. Please try again.
edit.billing_subtitle: Used when generating PIX deposits. CPF isn't required here, but will be requested on your first payment.
edit.danger_zone_description: Deleting your account is permanent. Your personal data will be erased and you won't be able to access the platform with this login anymore.
edit.delete_generic_error: Error deleting account. Please try again.

delete_modal.confirm_body: This action is permanent. Your personal data will be removed and you'll lose access to the account. This cannot be undone.
delete_modal.balance_warning: You have R$ {{balance}} in your wallet balance. Deleting your account will permanently lose that balance — withdraw it before continuing.
delete_modal.balance_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete your account and give up that balance?
